interface.shortDescription: BDD spec-driven delivery workflow for GitHub issue work.
interface.longDescription: NMG SDLC provides a structured software delivery loop: onboard a project, draft and start GitHub issues, write BDD requirements and implementation plans, implement from specs, verify against acceptance criteria, open pull requests, address review comments, and run unattended delivery cycles.
defaultPrompt: Onboard this project for spec-driven delivery.
Draft a GitHub issue for this feature.
Run the SDLC loop for issue #42.
